accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RenderMan diagnostics are available in Katana as live stats and offline JSON reports. Access to more advanced configuration is also available with the use of an environment variable or through a specialized OpScript.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RenderMan 诊断信息在 Katana 中可以通过 live stats（实时统计）和离线 JSON reports 使用。也可以通过 environment variable（环境变量）或专用 OpScript 访问更高级的配置。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The PrmanLiveStats Tab displays a live overview of metric data from an active Katana render.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: PrmanLiveStats Tab 会显示 active Katana render 中指标数据的 live overview。
Live Stats Overview（Live Stats 概览）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: To generate an end-of-render diagnostic report, set the PrmanGlobalStatements
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 要生成渲染结束时的 diagnostic report，请将 PrmanGlobalStatements

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: attribute to the desired output filename. (prmanGlobalStatements.options.statistics.jsonFilename).
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: attribute 设置为所需的输出文件名（prmanGlobalStatements.options.statistics.jsonFilename）。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: . Additionally, RfK supports customization of the configuration file search path and/or the configuration file name via specialized attributes:
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 来设置。此外，RfK 支持通过 specialized attributes 自定义 configuration file 的 search path 和/或 file name：

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: If set, these will take precedence over other options. The “stats” attributes are not exposed in PrmanGlobalStatements; they must be set via AttributeSet or OpScript. Below is an OpScript that exposes these two attributes as user args with defaults as listed above. Copy and paste into your Katana scene and modify the user attributes configPath and configFile name as needed.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 如果设置了这些 attributes，它们会优先于其他 options。“stats” attributes 不会暴露在 PrmanGlobalStatements 中；必须通过 AttributeSet 或 OpScript 设置。下面的 OpScript 会把这两个 attributes 作为 user args 暴露出来，并使用上面列出的 defaults。将其复制并粘贴到你的 Katana scene 中，并按需修改 user attributes configPath 和 configFile name。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: RfK will search for a configuration file with the following precedence:
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: RfK 将按以下优先级搜索 configuration file：

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: options take precedence over all other options (see OpScript below).
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: options 的优先级高于所有其他 options（见下方 OpScript）。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: if the environment variable is set.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 如果设置了该 environment variable。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: The stats.ini file used to configure the stats system includes flags to increase verbosity during config file loading and subsequent processing. If you are not explicitly using a custom stats.ini file, the default configuration will come from $RMANTREE/etc/stats.ini.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 用于配置 stats system 的 stats.ini 文件包含一些 flags，可在 config file 加载和后续处理期间提高 verbosity。如果没有明确使用 custom（自定义）stats.ini 文件，则默认配置将来自 $RMANTREE/etc/stats.ini。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: In your config file, set the stats debug
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 在 config file 中，将 stats debug

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: If you do not see these log messages after turning up the log level verbosity, you are likely picking up a different stats.ini configuration file. Check for an RMAN_STATS_CONFIG_PATH environment variable, or path/filename values from the
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 如果提高 log level verbosity 后仍未看到这些日志消息，你很可能正在读取另一个 stats.ini configuration file。请检查 RMAN_STATS_CONFIG_PATH environment variable（环境变量），或来自
